case_title: DIRECT MAIL CENTER VS. AMERICAN ACADEMY OF TASTE

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DIRECT MAIL CENTER
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JAN-23-2008, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT AMERICAN ACADEMY OF TASTE
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,250.59 FILED BY DIRECT MAIL CENTER AS TO DEFENDANT AMERICAN ACADEMY OF TASTE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-05-2008 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-05-2008 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF PRESENT. DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DIRECT MAIL CENTER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AMERICAN ACADEMY OF TASTE $1,250.55 PRINCIPAL, $70.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,320.55 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
